description: Crash node B then restart and reconverge tip/sync metrics
operator_action: Terminate node B abruptly (SIGKILL or container stop), restart it with standard operator procedure, then confirm health endpoints recover.
notes_hint: Verify sync lag returns to baseline and no unresolved Sev-1 incidents.

description: Restart a seed node without prolonged sync drift
operator_action: Stop seed A gracefully, restart it, and confirm peers reconnect without prolonged lag.
notes_hint: Ensure peer counts and sync status reconverge across the cluster.

description: Network isolate non-seed node and rejoin cleanly
operator_action: Isolate node C from peers for 10 minutes (network ACL/firewall), then remove isolation and verify clean rejoin.
notes_hint: Confirm no persistent desync/fork remains after rejoin.

description: Run snapshot restore/rebuild and recover healthy participation
operator_action: Follow docs/runbooks/RECOVERY_ORCHESTRATION.md to execute restore or rebuild for one node, then validate healthy participation.
notes_hint: Attach command logs and final status snapshots to release evidence bundle.

description: Detach an external miner and recover submit acceptance rate
operator_action: Stop one external miner process, wait 15 minutes, restart it, and verify template/submit loop resumes.
notes_hint: Confirm submit acceptance recovers and rejection spikes are explained.
